name: SCC_CreateSessionStopRes_DIN
title: SCC_CreateSessionStopRes_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateSessionStopRes_DIN ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[] )
description: Creates a Session Stop Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
